texto: …breaking the heart of someone you still love is a rare horror, not funny to anyone, except perhaps Satan…and even his pleasure would be spoiled by not having had a hand in it, by the dumb, wasteful accident of the thing. The Devil wants meaning just like the rest of us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Glenn Duncan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “…breaking the heart of someone you still love is a rare horror, not funny to anyone, except perha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, heartbreak, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love e meaning.
